documentation:
# madcubapy

Package to read MADCUBA product like maps or spectra alongside their history files.

This package is in its first test versions and should not be used in its current state.

modules.name: madcubapy.io
documentation: radioastro/madcubaio/__init__.py

classes.name: madcubapy.io.madcubafits.MadcubaFits

methods.name: madcubapy.io.madcubafits.MadcubaFits.hist
documentation: `astropy.table.Table` : Table of the hist file.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.madcubafits.MadcubaFits.add_hist
documentation:
Load the hist table from a csv file.

Parameters
----------
filename : str or pathlib.Path
    Path of the history csv file.

A basic class describing a MADCUBA Fits object with its hist file.

The MadcubaFits class contains the only object shared by MADCUBA
maps, cubes, and spectra: an Astropy Table describing the history
file exported by MADCUBA.

Parameters
----------
hist : `astropy.table.Table`
    An astropy Table object containing the history information of the fits
    file, which is stored in a separate _hist.csv file.

documentation: madcubapy/__init__.py

documentation: `astropy.nddata.CCDData` : CCDData object of the fits map.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.madcubamap.MadcubaMap.data
documentation: `numpy.ndarray` : The data of the fits map.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.madcubamap.MadcubaMap.header
documentation: `astropy.io.fits.Header` : The header of the fits map.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.madcubamap.MadcubaMap.wcs
documentation: `astropy.wcs.WCS` : The header of the fits map.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.madcubamap.MadcubaMap.unit
documentation: `astropy.units.Unit` : The data of the fits map.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.madcubamap.MadcubaMap.read
documentation:
Generate a MadcubaMap object from a FITS file. This method creates an
Astropy CCDData from the fits file.

Parameters
----------
filename : str
    Name of fits file.
kwargs
    Additional keyword parameters passed through to the Astropy
    CCDData.read() class method.

A container for MADCUBA fits maps, using the
`radioastro.madcubaio.MadcubaFits` interface.

This class is basically a wrapper to read MADCUBA exported fits and their
hist files with astropy.

Parameters
----------
data : numpy.ndarray
    The data array associated with the FITS file.
header : astropy.io.fits.Header
    The header object associated with the FITS file.
wcs : astropy.wcs.WCS
    The WCS object associated with the FITS file.
unit : astropy.units.Base.unit
    The unit of the data of the FITS file.
hist : astropy.table.Table
    An astropy Table object containing the history information of the fits
    file, which is stored in a separate _hist.csv file.
ccddata : astropy.nddata.CCDData
    An astropy CCDData object loaded with astropy as a failsafe.

modules.name: madcubapy.utils
documentation: madcubapy/utils/__init__.py

functions.name: madcubapy.io.spectracontainer.parse_row_spectral_axis
documentation:
Generate an array for the spectral axis of a spectrum inside a
SpectraContainer.

Parameters
----------
table_row : `astropy.table.Row`
    Row of a SpectralContainer's bintable. This is the data for a spectrum
    inside a MADCUBA .fits file

Return
------
spectral_array : np.array or astropy.units.Quantity
    Returned spectral axis array with units if correctly parsed from the
    fits file.

classes.name: madcubapy.io.spectracontainer.SpectraContainer

methods.name: madcubapy.io.spectracontainer.SpectraContainer.bintable
documentation: `astropy.table.Table` : Table of the hist file.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.spectracontainer.SpectraContainer.read
documentation:
Generate a SpectraContainer object from a FITS file.

Parameters
----------
filename : str
    Name of spec file.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.spectracontainer.SpectraContainer._generate_spectral_axes
documentation:
Generate arrays for the spectral axes of every spectra inside the
SpectraContainer and add them as a new table column.

methods.name: madcubapy.io.spectracontainer.SpectraContainer._parse_data_units
documentation:
Parse the BUNIT column values. If all are equal, set it as the unit for
the DATA column.

A container for MADCUBA spectra, using the
`radioastro.madcubaio.MadcubaFits` interface.

This class is basically a wrapper to read MADCUBA exported fits and their
hist files with astropy.

Parameters
----------
bintable : astropy.table.Table
    An astropy table containing the data of every spectra contained in the
    fits file alongside the info of their headers.
hist : astropy.table.Table
    An astropy table ontaining the history information of the fits file,
    which is stored in a separate _hist.csv file.

functions.name: madcubapy.utils.spectral.create_spectral_array
documentation:
Create a spectral axis array.

Parameters
----------
nchan : int
    Number of channels in the spectrum.
cdelt : float or astropy.units.Quantity
    Width of a channel.
crpix : float
    Reference channel in the spectrum.
crval : float
    Value of the reference channel in the spectrum.

Return
------
spectral_array : np.array or astropy.units.Quantity
    Returned spectral axis array with units if cdelt is a quantity
